sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n82299" key="peristu/fw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περιστύφω</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῡ]</pron>, <sense id="n82299.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">dry up by astringents</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τὸ δάκρυον</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.659d</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
